title: Burnable Trash
bagNote: Must use Yomitan-designated blue bags. Available at most supermarkets and convenience stores.
instructions: Food scraps, paper, clothing, rubber, leather
Drain all liquid from food waste before bagging
Place out before 8:00 AM on pickup day

title: Non-Burnable Trash
instructions: Items must fit inside the bag or be less than 30cm
Larger items require a separate large-item pickup request

title: Cans
bagNote: Any clear or semi-transparent bag is fine.
instructions: Crush if possible to save space
Aerosol cans: empty completely and remove the cap
